summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Exagram blood count exam analysis SaaS application. Backend APIs 94% passing (31/33 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with all core user flows working correctly.

critical.issue: Foreign key constraint error prevents tenant deletion - IntegrityError: Cannot delete or update a parent row: a foreign key constraint fails (exa_users.tenant_id references exa_tenants.id)
critical.root_cause: MySQL table exa_users was created without ON DELETE CASCADE constraint, even though the code defines it. Need to ALTER TABLE to add the cascade constraint.
critical.fix_suggestion: Run: ALTER TABLE exa_users DROP FOREIGN KEY exa_users_ibfk_1; ALTER TABLE exa_users ADD CONSTRAINT exa_users_ibfk_1 FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id) REFERENCES exa_tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;

critical.issue: Same foreign key constraint error as tenant deletion - LGPD account deletion fails
critical.root_cause: Same as above - cascade delete not working
critical.fix_suggestion: Fix the foreign key constraint as described above

working_features: Landing page loads correctly with all sections
User registration flow - creates user with 1 free credit
LGPD consent flow - both steps (terms/privacy and sensitive data) working
User login flow with proper redirect to dashboard
Dashboard page loads with upload zone, exam history, and credits display
Specialists page loads and displays specialists with search filters
Admin dashboard - Overview tab with statistics
Admin dashboard - Tenants tab with user list
Admin dashboard - Specialists tab with CRUD operations

passed_tests: Admin endpoints with user token rejection
failed_tests: Admin delete tenant - Foreign key constraint error
Delete test user account - Foreign key constraint error
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix MySQL foreign key constraint for exa_users table to enable cascade delete. Run ALTER TABLE commands to add ON DELETE CASCADE to the tenant_id foreign key.
Alternative fix: Modify delete endpoints to manually delete related records in order (exa_consents, exa_chat_messages, exa_exams, exa_users, then exa_tenants)
critical_code_review_comments: Foreign key cascade delete not working in MySQL - table was created before the ON DELETE CASCADE was added to the schema definition
Consider adding explicit deletion order in delete endpoints as a fallback

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple test users created during testing with pattern: *_test_*@exagram.com

seed_data_creation: Test specialists and tenants created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core user flows working. Only issue is tenant/user deletion due to MySQL foreign key constraint. The cascade delete defined in code is not applied to the existing database table. Main agent needs to either: 1) ALTER TABLE to add cascade constraint, or 2) Modify delete endpoints to manually delete related records first.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Tenant and user deletion fails with IntegrityError
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: MySQL table exa_users was created before ON DELETE CASCADE was added to the foreign key definition. The CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS statement doesn't update existing tables.
reproduction_steps: 2. Try to delete the tenant via admin API or user account deletion
3. Error: IntegrityError (1451) - Cannot delete parent row due to foreign key constraint
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Either ALTER TABLE to add cascade constraint, or modify delete endpoints to delete in order: exa_consents -> exa_chat_messages -> exa_exams -> exa_users -> exa_tenants
